race.comment: Midweek staying contest which is a typically difficult assignment for punters. At odds BLACKLIST (6) might be worth the gamble. Ran a better race last start at the fourth run back from a spell, battling on well to be beaten just 1.3 lengths over 1800m in a Hawkesbury Saturday metro race. Looking for this trip now and is peaking at the right time. NATOYA (9) caught the eye over the mile here two back then lacked a turn of foot over 1800m at Hawkesbury last time. Happy to give her another chance over this longer journey at the fourth run back from a break. Waller brings SO SUAVE (8) to NSW after some sound recent efforts at or around this trip in Victoria. On-pacer who will be given every chance with McDonald in the saddle. DOLCE DIOR (11) is racing well without winning. Placed at both runs here at this distance and with the light weight is a genuine contender. LUPA CAPITOLINA (15) backs up seven days after an eye-catching second over 1800m at the Kenso. Will be running on again.
